results.title: Wishes: Shareable wishlist for any occasion | Product Hunt
results.content:
Hey everyone, We are so happy to introduce Wishes, the app we built to make gifting easier, more joyful, and to help people bring their dreams to life. Wishes allows you to collect all your dreams and desires in beautiful, customizable wishlists that you can share with anyone on any platform via a short URL—so you get exactly what you wished for, with no duplicates. Wishes was born from a personal need to share meaningful gift ideas with loved ones. We were driven to create a wishlist app that goes beyond mere functionality, making gift-giving enjoyable and memorable. With our small team, we’ve put countless hours into designing the user experience and making the app just perfect, though we still have a lot left on our roadmap. Today, we’re thrilled to finally let Wishes take flight—and [...] Report

Mikhail Fabrikov

Tried a lot of wishlist apps, this one is the best, great work on design part! Just wondering, what are plans for monetization? Curated gift ideas is the way to go i guess? Anyway, congrats, would love to see Wishes thrive!

Report

Alexandra Protsenko

Paste

Paste

Maker

@mikhail\_fabrikov thank you so much for the kind words! As for monetization, at the moment, we offer handcrafted themes for purchase to add a festive touch to wishlists. Of course, we're always exploring other ways to enhance the app while keeping the core experience free for everyone. Thanks again for your support! 🙌

Report

Theodore Michalas [...] Report

Chris Messina

Osaurus

Osaurus

Hunter

I'm a huge fan of Paste — and Wishes features the same attention to all the lovely details, but focused on the simple act of curating your wish lists. It's easy enough to find and add items to your lists, visually customize them, and then share them to others, regardless of the device they're on. I've used Reminders and Things 3.0 for this in the past, but this is so much more fun! ✨🎁✨

Report

Dmitry Mikhaylov

Hey all, Great app to plan your birthday. It's first user-friendly app where I store my wish list and share with friends. I love how easy it is to create and share my wishlist with Wishes! Such a game changer for gift-giving! Thanks! :)

Report

### Building a wishlist app that lets you mix clothes from any store – would you use this? 👀

I'm launching Wontsy in 2 weeks. It's a wishlist app where you save items from any store (H&M, Zara, ASOS, whatever) and build outfit collages to see how pieces look together before buying.

Working on adding a social feed where you can browse other people's looks and buy the outfit instantly.
